core_mechanism: minimization of an action functional over a measure on a space, whose Euler-Lagrange stationarity conditions on the minimizing support induce a geometry and yield the governing field equations, with systematic corrections obtained as a perturbative power-series expansion in a small regularization parameter
brief_reason: The abstract takes a minimizing measure of the causal action and derives that the Euler-Lagrange equations of that action force the Ricci/field (Einstein) equations, with corrections given by a power expansion in the regularization length, which is a variational action-minimization principle generating field equations via stationarity.
